🔍 SolarisPKN Live Architecture

Everything you see here is open source (public repositories). Only paid services are symbolically encrypted.

      graph TD
        A["🌞 solarispkn.pages.dev
Astro + GitHub + Cloudflare Pages"] -->|Fetch API| B["⚡ Cloudflare Worker
solarispkn-api"]
        B --> C["(🗄️ D1 Database)
users, posts, entitlements"]
        B --> D["(⚡ KV Cache)
sesiones y early access"]
        B --> E["(📦 R2 Storage)
firmware premium"]
        C --> F["📋 Tablas: users, products, licenses"]
        E --> G["🔒 Firmware ESP32 Low Power"]
        style A fill:#1E1E2F,stroke:#00FFCC,stroke-width:2px
        style B fill:#1E1E2F,stroke:#FF79C6,stroke-width:2px
        style C fill:#1E1E2F,stroke:#50FA7B,stroke-width:2px
        style D fill:#1E1E2F,stroke:#50FA7B,stroke-width:2px
        style E fill:#1E1E2F,stroke:#FFB86C,stroke-width:2px

⚡ Soon you will be able to click on each node to see live logs.

⚡ Transparent Lab — Open source — Status: operational
